message:
fix(metaballs): correct Off quality behavior to leave buffer unchanged

Updated the quality_off test to verify the correct behavior: when
FxQuality::Off is set, decorative backdrop effects should NOT modify
the output buffer at all. The previous test incorrectly expected
transparent pixels.

The correct semantics for Off quality:
- Decorative effects are non-essential and should skip rendering
- Existing buffer content remains intact (no modification)
- This allows the underlying content to show through undisturbed

This matches the principle that Off quality means "disable this
effect entirely" rather than "render a transparent layer".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
